task_completion.description: Open the Landsat multi-spectral GeoTIFF file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'landsat_multispectral' product is visible in the Product Explorer panel of the SNAP application.
A 'Spatial Subset' dialog is open with width and height set to 300, or a new subset product is visible in the Product Explorer.

task_completion.description: Save the subset as a BEAM-DIMAP product to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/snap_projects/farm_subset.dim', or the saved file is visible in a file manager in that directory.

task_completion.description: Generate a scatter plot for the subset using band_3 (X-axis) and band_2 (Y-axis)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Scatter Plot' window is open in SNAP, showing a plot with 'band_3' selected for the X-axis and 'band_2' selected for the Y-axis.

task_completion.description: Export the scatter plot to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog for the scatter plot shows the filename 'red_nir_scatter.png' in the '/home/ga/snap_exports/' directory, or the file is visible in a file manager.

integrity.description: The agent used the SNAP GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: The SNAP application GUI is used for opening, subsetting, plotting, and exporting. Terminal commands (like SNAP's gpt tool or python scripts) are not used to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The scatter plot is generated by the SNAP application
integrity.visual_evidence: The scatter plot window is clearly part of the SNAP interface, with its characteristic toolbars, styling, and data point rendering.

integrity.description: Files are created through the application, not mocked
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported files and saved products are created through the application's save/export dialogs, not by renaming or moving dummy files in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The subset must be exactly 300x300 pixels and saved to /home/ga/snap_projects/farm_subset.dim. The scatter plot must use band_3 for the X-axis and band_2 for the Y-axis, and be exported to /home/ga/snap_exports/red_nir_scatter.png.
